[Answer Strategy] Tier 1 and Tier 2 answers can also be cached on disk by normalized query plus retrieval/generation provenance. Cached answers preserve evidence blocks so API responses remain inspectable.
[Flow] On rebuild, unchanged source documents can be reused from the persisted index state so the system skips re-parsing, re-normalizing, re-mapping, and re-embedding for those files.
[Answer Strategy] With `OKR_GENERATION_PROVIDER=openai`, Tier 2 can synthesize across multiple blocks while still being constrained to retrieved evidence and citation-aware prompting.
[Current Phase] So the remaining roadmap is no longer about building the MVP. It is about validating, calibrating, and hardening the system we already have.
